description: Architectural rules ALL agents must follow. Non-negotiable.

rules.name: no_quick_fixes
rules.rule: Never patch symptoms. Always fix root cause. Band-aid fixes create fragile systems.
rules.enforcement: All agents must diagnose root cause before proposing any fix. Frodex rejects patch-only PRs.

rules.name: commander_delegates
rules.rule: Oragorn delegates, never does work himself. Spawn sub-agents or trigger pipelines.
rules.enforcement: Oragorn SOUL.md enforces. Logron monitors for commander doing execution work.

rules.name: pipeline_owns_orchestration
rules.rule: Lobster pipelines decide step order. LLM never decides what comes next.
rules.enforcement: Pipeline YAML is the authority. Agents only participate at designated steps.

rules.name: schema_validates_everything
rules.rule: Every artifact flowing between pipeline steps validates against JSON schema.
rules.enforcement: Balrog schema validation gate. Reject on extra fields, missing required.

rules.name: evidence_not_claims
rules.rule: Something only happened if deterministic proof exists. Never trust an agent saying 'I did it'.
rules.enforcement: Pipeline verification steps check file exists, DB record written, API returned 200.

rules.name: right_model_right_step
rules.rule: Opus for reasoning. Cheaper models for formatting/summarization. No waste.
rules.enforcement: Throttle config limits Quandalf calls. Parameter sweeps are deterministic.

rules.name: quandalf_owns_strategy
rules.rule: Quandalf makes ALL strategy decisions. No other agent designs or modifies strategies.
rules.enforcement: Balrog agent boundaries. Frodex cannot write to strategy_specs or theses.

rules.name: self_healing_first
rules.rule: Errors auto-fix when possible. Only escalate when auto-fix fails.
rules.enforcement: known_fixes registry. Logron matches errors, applies fixes, logs results.

rules.name: memory_stays_lean
rules.rule: No unbounded context growth. Memory compressed on schedule. Dense data in SQLite.
rules.enforcement: Memory management pipeline. Logron monitors folder sizes.

rules.name: immutable_security
rules.rule: Balrog rules cannot be modified by any agent. Only Asz changes firewall rules.
rules.enforcement: Balrog workspace read-only to all agents. rules.json is law.
